dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_transactions: No transactions yet. Press Ctrl+N to add one.

dashboard_widgets.customize_hint: Toggle widgets on/off and reorder them with the arrows.
dashboard_widgets.min_one: Keep at least one widget enabled.
dashboard_widgets.no_budgets: No budgets set for this month.
dashboard_widgets.no_merchants: No payee-tagged spending in the last 30 days.
dashboard_widgets.nothing_planned: Nothing planned in the next 14 days.
dashboard_widgets.no_transactions: No expenses in the last 30 days.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.enter_rate_or_amount: Enter exchange rate or destination amount.
transactions.delete_confirm: Delete this transaction? This cannot be undone.
transactions.split_edit_note: Split rows cannot be edited here.
transactions.delete_confirm_multi: Delete {count} transaction(s)? This cannot be undone.

tags.title: Tags
tags.name: Tag name
tags.description_hint: Optional short note about this tag
tags.no_tags_hint: Click "Add Tag" to create your first tag.

wizard.title: Financial Wizard
wizard.subtitle: A step-by-step guide that helps you stay on top of your money — spotting gaps, building safety nets, and preparing for what's coming.
wizard.step_next_month_desc: Are all expected expenses for next month covered by planned income? Wizard scans your planned transactions and flags any shortfall before the month starts.
wizard.step_unplanned_desc: Detects irregular or one-off costs from the past (car service, dentist, school fees) that are likely to repeat — and suggests adding them as planned transactions.
wizard.step_sub_tracker_desc: Scans your transactions for repeating payments (streaming, software, memberships) and builds a live list you can review, tag, and cancel from.
wizard.step_sub_renewals_desc: Heads-up for subscriptions about to renew — 7-day and 1-day alerts so you can cancel before being charged for another cycle.
wizard.step_sub_audit_desc: Flags subscriptions that look unused or duplicated (e.g. two music services, overlapping cloud storage) so you can cut the bill without losing what you use.
wizard.step_sub_cost_trends_desc: Tracks your total monthly subscription spend and how it grows over time — broken down by group (streaming, SaaS, memberships) so you see which is leading the bill.
wizard.step_emergency_desc: Guides you to build a buffer of 3–6 months of essential expenses. Calculates your minimum monthly outgoings and shows how far you are from the target.
wizard.step_irregular_desc: Groups historically irregular expenses (insurance, car maintenance, appliances) and calculates a monthly amount to set aside so they never catch you off guard.
wizard.step_vacation_desc: Helps you plan ahead for holidays, Christmas, school start — spread the cost evenly over the months before, so there's no budget shock.
wizard.step_salary_desc: For irregular income: calculates a safe fixed monthly 'salary' to transfer to yourself based on your worst recent month, letting the rest accumulate as a buffer.
wizard.step_budget_builder_desc: Walks through each spending category and suggests a realistic budget based on your actual average spending over the last 3–6 months.
wizard.step_scenarios_desc: Simulates the impact of income drops, big purchases, or new recurring expenses on your monthly balance and emergency fund runway.
wizard.cta_note: These features are planned. Each will be a guided, interactive walkthrough — not just a report.
wizard.setup_title: Getting started — set up your finances
wizard.setup_subtitle: Complete these 4 steps so Kaleta can correctly calculate balances and budgets.
wizard.setup_institution_desc: Bank, credit card, broker — every account needs an institution.
wizard.setup_institution_hint: You can't add an account without an institution.
wizard.setup_account: Create an account with opening balance
wizard.setup_account_desc: Enter the current balance from your bank statement as the opening balance. From this point Kaleta will calculate correctly.
wizard.setup_account_hint: No account — you can't import or track transactions.
wizard.setup_categories_desc: Categories let you group transactions and build a budget. You need at least one expense category and one income category.
wizard.setup_categories_hint: Without categories, transactions won't be properly classified.
wizard.setup_categories_count: You have {expense} expense and {income} income categories.
wizard.setup_import_desc: Import history from CSV or add transactions manually. This fills charts and reports with real data.
wizard.setup_import_hint: No transactions — dashboard and reports will be empty.
wizard.mentor_all_quiet: Nothing to nudge you about right now — nice work.
wizard.mentor_uncategorised_body: You have {count} un-categorised transactions. Categorise them so budgets and reports add up.
wizard.mentor_no_budget_body: Set amounts for your expense categories so you can see budget vs actual.
wizard.mentor_no_planned_body: Recurring income and bills make forecasts far more accurate.
wizard.mentor_logos_body: {count} institution(s) still have no logo. A logo makes accounts easier to scan at a glance.

budget_builder.title: Budget Builder
budget_builder.subtitle: Plan your year in a single place — income, fixed bills, and variable spending. Applying writes 12 monthly budget rows per category.
budget_builder.section_income_hint: Expected income for the year. Informational — does not create budget rows.
budget_builder.section_fixed_hint: Recurring bills like rent, subscriptions, insurance. Optionally link to a category to contribute to its monthly budget.
budget_builder.section_variable_hint: Everyday spending — groceries, fuel, leisure. A category is required; the yearly amount is split evenly across 12 months.
budget_builder.need_categories: Add at least one expense category before planning variable spending.
budget_builder.reserves_deferred: Reserves step coming soon — will split vacation and irregular funds across the year.
budget_builder.nothing_to_change: Budgets already match the plan — nothing to change.
budget_builder.empty_plan: Nothing to apply — add at least one fixed-with-category or variable line.
budget_builder.reserves_link_body: Track emergency, irregular and vacation funds in one place.

safety_funds.title: Safety & Reserve Funds
safety_funds.subtitle: Track coverage for your emergency fund, irregular expenses, and vacation savings.
safety_funds.name: Name
safety_funds.need_account: Add a savings account before creating a fund.
safety_funds.empty_body: Add your first fund to start tracking coverage.
safety_funds.confirm_delete_body: "{name}" will be removed permanently. This cannot be undone — consider archiving instead.
safety_funds.archived_section_body: Funds you've retired. Restore any time.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Track recurring paid services. Spot overlaps, plan renewals, see the real yearly drain.
subscriptions.detector_empty: No new recurring patterns detected in the last 12 months.
subscriptions.detector_hint: Confirm to start tracking. Already-tracked payees are excluded.
subscriptions.renewals_empty: No renewals due in the next 30 days.
subscriptions.active_empty: No subscriptions yet. Run the detector above or add one manually.
subscriptions.confirm_delete_body: "{name}" will be removed permanently. Historical charges stay in your transactions.

monthly_readiness.title: Monthly Readiness
monthly_readiness.subtitle: Four quick stages to close last month and set {month} up for success.
monthly_readiness.not_ready_hint: Complete all four stages to mark the month ready.
monthly_readiness.stage_2_no_income: No recurring income rules fire this month.
monthly_readiness.stage_4_no_bills: No planned bills for this month.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.delete_confirm: Delete account "{name}"? All its transactions will be permanently deleted.

institutions.title: Institutions
institutions.no_institutions: No institutions yet. Add one to get started.
institutions.delete_confirm: Delete institution "{name}"? Accounts linked to it will be unlinked.
institutions.logo_invalid_format: Unsupported logo format. Use SVG, PNG, JPG or WEBP.

categories.title: Categories
categories.delete_warning: Transactions using it will become uncategorised.
categories.delete_subcategory_warning: Its subcategories will also be deleted.
categories.subcategories_also_deleted: Its subcategories will also be deleted.
categories.template_desc_single-person: Minimal set for rent, food, transit.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.no_budgets: No budget entries for this month.
budgets.all_budgeted: All expense categories have budgets this month.

realization.title: Realization
realization.subtitle: How each budgeted category is tracking this month.
realization.no_rows: No budgeted categories for this month. Create a budget first.

budget_plan.title: Budget Plan
budget_plan.copy_forward_nothing: Nothing to copy — either the source month has no budgets, or every category is already set.
budget_plan.set_zero_hint: Set to 0 or leave empty to remove.
budget_plan.set_all_hint: Sets this amount for all 12 months. Individual months can still be overridden.
budget_plan.monthly_set: Monthly budget set for all 12 months.
budget_plan.help_text: Single year: click Monthly column to set all 12 months; click a cell to override. Multiple years: read-only comparison. Orange ~ = mixed amounts.

import.title: Import Transactions
import.drop_hint_generic: Drop CSV file here or click to browse
import.drop_hint_mbank: Drop mBank CSV file here or click to browse
import.upload_hint_generic: Supported formats: date, amount, description. Negative = expense, positive = income.
import.upload_hint_mbank: Export from mBank → History → Export CSV.
import.no_rows: No rows found to import. Skipped: {skipped}.
import.not_mbank_file: This file does not look like an mBank statement.
import.no_data_section: Could not find data section. Make sure this is a valid mBank statement.
import.auto_matched: Account matched automatically based on account number
import.currency_mismatch: File currency ({file}) differs from account currency ({account})
import.currency_mismatch_block: Import blocked: file currency ({file}) does not match account currency ({account}). Please select the correct account.
import.transfer_hint: Links pairs of equal-amount transactions between accounts.
import.queue_empty: Drop one or more files above to build the import queue.
import.queue_active_hint: Click a file to edit its mapping.
import.queue_inherited: Settings copied from the previous file.
import.no_files_to_import: Add at least one file to the queue.

payees.title: Payees
payees.no_payees_hint: Payees are created automatically during mBank CSV import, or you can add them manually.
payees.name: Payee name
payees.delete_confirm: Delete payee "{name}"? Linked transactions will keep their data but lose the payee reference.
payees.merge_hint: All transactions from the other payees will be reassigned to the one you keep. The rest will be deleted.

forecast.title: Forecast
forecast.running: Running Prophet — this may take a few seconds...
forecast.status_running: Forecast for: {account} | {days} historical days + {horizon} day forecast
forecast.scenarios_empty: No scenarios — add one to model a windfall, big purchase or raise.
forecast.scenario_incomplete: Fill label, date and a numeric amount.

planned.title: Planned Transactions
planned.name: Name
planned.no_planned_hint: Add recurring income and expenses to improve forecasting accuracy.

reports.title: Reports
reports.run_to_preview: Configure and run the report to see a chart.
reports.no_data: No data for the selected filters.

reports_lib.title: Reports Library
reports_lib.intro: Golden-standard financial reports. Pick one to drill into a specific view, or open the advanced builder for custom ad-hoc analysis.
reports_lib.advanced_builder_hint: Need something custom? Use the drag-and-drop report builder.
reports_lib.income_statement_desc: Monthly profit & loss: income minus expenses, by category.
reports_lib.cash_flow_desc: Inflows vs outflows across categories for a given month.
reports_lib.budget_variance_desc: Planned vs actual spend per category with variance.
reports_lib.savings_rate_desc: Share of income you kept each month over time.
reports_lib.spending_by_category_desc: Where your money went over a date range.
reports_lib.top_merchants_desc: Largest payees by spend over a date range.
reports_lib.yoy_desc: Compare one year to the previous, month by month.
reports_lib.ytd_summary_desc: Running year totals: income, expenses, net, savings rate.
reports_lib.largest_transactions_desc: Biggest expenses in a window — quick outlier check.
reports_lib.net_worth_statement_desc: Current snapshot of all assets and liabilities.

settings.title: Settings
settings.currency_hint: Used as the base currency for net worth calculations.
settings.exchange_rates_hint: Rates are recorded automatically from transfers and used for historical net worth. Add past rates manually when needed.
settings.rate_invalid: Enter a valid rate greater than 0.
settings.no_rates_yet: No rates recorded yet. Add one or make a cross-currency transfer.
settings.backup_hint: Download a full backup of all your data, or restore from a previous backup. Restoring will replace all current data.
settings.restore_warning: Warning: this will permanently replace ALL current data with the backup contents. This cannot be undone.
settings.restore_file_ready: File ready. Click Restore to proceed.
settings.data_hint: Populate the database with 6 years of realistic example data, or wipe everything clean.
settings.seed_confirm_body: This will overwrite ALL existing data with 6 years of realistic demo transactions, accounts and budgets. This cannot be undone.
settings.clear_confirm_body: This will permanently delete ALL transactions, accounts, categories, budgets and every other record. This cannot be undone.

audit.title: Change History
audit.hint: Last {n} database changes. Click Revert to undo any individual change.

setup.choose_storage: Choose how you want to store your data
setup.local_desc: Store your data on this device. Perfect for personal use and privacy.
setup.cloud_desc: Connect to a PostgreSQL server. Ideal for access from multiple devices.
setup.new_desc: Create a new empty database in a folder of your choice.
setup.open_desc: Open an existing Kaleta database file.
